CVE-2025-53603.title: In Alinto SOPE SOGo 2.0.2 through 5.12.2, sope-core/NGExtensions/ ...
CVE-2025-53603.description: In Alinto SOPE SOGo 2.0.2 through 5.12.2, sope-core/NGExtensions/NGHashMap.m allows a NULL pointer dereference and SOGo crash via a request in which a parameter in the query string is a duplicate of a parameter in the POST body.
